# Right PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 150.562 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 0.6688
  biquad b0=1.00254153391 b1=-1.98758202569 b2=0.985136998896 a1=-1.98758202569 a2=0.987678532807

  biquad b0=1.00256343238 b1=-1.98746665753 b2=0.98500893567 a1=-1.98746665753 a2=0.987572368055

  biquad b0=1.00254588451 b1=-1.98755626967 b2=0.985111556394 a1=-1.98755626967 a2=0.987657440905

  biquad b0=1.06809618374 b1=-1.64712455679 b2=0.601770548958 a1=-1.64712455679 a2=0.669866732703

  biquad b0=1.00128170666 b1=-1.99350999469 b2=0.992504523558 a1=-1.99350999469 a2=0.993786230221
